description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a natural grain texture and a dark, weathered appearance. The head of the axe is made of solid metal, finished in a matte black, and has a broad, wedge-shaped blade with a flat poll on the opposite side. The blade is thick and sturdy, designed for chopping or splitting, and is securely mounted onto the handle. The handle widens slightly at the end, providing a better grip and preventing slippage during use. There are no visible decorative elements, engravings, or branding on either the handle or the blade. The overall design is utilitarian, suggesting it is intended for practical use in tasks such as wood chopping or demolition in urban or outdoor environments.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a matte black metal blade, designed for practical chopping tasks. The handle is textured and the blade is broad and wedge-shaped.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the broad, wedge-shaped metal blade.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the narrow profile of the axe, with the handle and blade aligned in a straight line.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curvature and the flat poll of the axe head.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the thickness of the blade and the way it is mounted onto the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a natural grain, oval cross-section, slightly flared at the end for grip, no additional grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad wedge-shaped blade with a flat poll, straight edge, no beard, and no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the handle.
